pidilite-pegoland-classic.name: PEGOLAND CLASSIC
pidilite-pegoland-classic.description: C1 cementitious adhesive for bonding ceramic tiles with medium water absorption on interior and exterior floors and interior wall tiling. Economical general-purpose tile adhesive.

pidilite-pegoland-uno.name: PEGOLAND UNO
pidilite-pegoland-uno.description: C1 cementitious tile adhesive for bonding ceramic tiles with medium-to-high water absorption. For interior and exterior floors and interior walls.

pidilite-pegoland-uno-plus.name: PEGOLAND UNO PLUS
pidilite-pegoland-uno-plus.description: C1TE cementitious tile adhesive with improved slip resistance (T) and extended open time (E). For interior and exterior floors and interior walls. Upgrade from standard Pegoland Uno.

pidilite-pegoland-dos.name: PEGOLAND DOS
pidilite-pegoland-dos.description: C2T cementitious adhesive with mixed binders, improved adhesion. For bonding ceramic tiles, porcelain, marble and granite on interior/exterior floors and interior walls.

pidilite-pegoland-dos-plus.name: PEGOLAND DOS PLUS
pidilite-pegoland-dos-plus.description: C2TE cementitious adhesive with mixed binders, improved adhesion, slip resistance and extended open time. Especially recommended for installing rectified tiles and new flooring over old ceramic floors.
application_areas: Interior and exterior floors, interior tile walls

pidilite-pegoland-dos-plus-extra-white.name: PEGOLAND DOS PLUS EXTRA WHITE
pidilite-pegoland-dos-plus-extra-white.description: C2TE extra-white cementitious tile adhesive with mixed binders. High-whiteness formulation for translucent stones and mosaics where white background is critical.

pidilite-pegoland-flex.name: PEGOLAND FLEX
pidilite-pegoland-flex.description: C2TE S1 deformable cementitious tile adhesive with mixed bonding agents. High flexibility and adherence, reduced slip, extended open time. Specially recommended for façades, large areas, and underfloor heating systems.

pidilite-pegoland-superflex.name: PEGOLAND SUPERFLEX
pidilite-pegoland-superflex.description: C2TE S2 highly deformable cementitious tile adhesive. Excellent workability, high flexibility and adhesion, reduced slip, extended open time. For slate and demanding installations.

pidilite-pegoland-fast-flex.name: PEGOLAND FAST FLEX
pidilite-pegoland-fast-flex.description: C2FTE S1 fast-hardening deformable cementitious tile adhesive with mixed bonding agents. Reduced slip, fast drying. Does not stain stones after curing. Especially for façades, large floors, underfloor heating and fast-track projects.

pidilite-pegoland-elastic.name: PEGOLAND ELASTIC R2T
pidilite-pegoland-elastic.description: Two-component reactive epoxy-polyurethane tile adhesive (R2T). Improved white bicomponent reactive adhesive with no vertical sliding. For ceramic tiles, mosaics, natural stones and resin conglomerates.

pidilite-morcemcolor-universal-grout.name: MORCEMCOLOR UNIVERSAL GROUT
pidilite-morcemcolor-universal-grout.description: Coloured cementitious grout with additives, great fineness and plasticity. For sealing joints 2 to 15 mm in all types of floor and wall tiling. Special for grouting low-porosity pieces (porcelain stoneware) and swimming pools.
pidilite-morcemcolor-universal-grout.classification: CG2 A W (EN 13888 — improved cementitious grout with reduced water absorption and abrasion resistance)

coverage.notes: e.g. 15×15 cm tile with 5 mm joint = 0.68 kg/m²

pidilite-morcemcolor-plus-flexible.name: MORCEMCOLOR PLUS FLEXIBLE
pidilite-morcemcolor-plus-flexible.description: Coloured water-repellent CG2 WA cementitious grout with mixed binders, anti-fungal and anti-algae bioactive technology. AQUASTOP effect for pearl water beading. For low-porosity tiles and pools.
pidilite-morcemcolor-plus-flexible.classification: CG2 W A (EN 13888 — with reduced water absorption W and abrasion resistance A)

coverage.notes: e.g. 30×40 cm tile with 5 mm joint = 0.30 kg/m²

pidilite-morcemcolor-epoxy.name: MORCEMCOLOR EPOXY
pidilite-morcemcolor-epoxy.description: RG reactive resin epoxy grout. Highly acid-resistant and impermeable. For pools, ponds, spas, thermal baths with saline or acid-treated water, and areas with extreme temperature fluctuations.

pidilite-fevicol-floorfix-supertac.name: FEVICOL FLOORFIX SUPERTAC
pidilite-fevicol-floorfix-supertac.description: Water-based acrylic tackifier for dry-lay installation of floor tiles and carpets. Provides releasable tacky bond for modular flooring.

pidilite-fevicol-floorfix-xpress.name: FEVICOL FLOORFIX XPRESS
pidilite-fevicol-floorfix-xpress.description: Multipurpose acrylic adhesive for bonding vinyl, rubber, linoleum, and carpet flooring. Fast-grab, high-strength dispersion adhesive.

pidilite-stauf-r-202.name: STAUF R 202
pidilite-stauf-r-202.description: One-component polyurethane adhesive for rubber, PVC, vinyl and textile floor coverings on absorbent and non-absorbent substrates.

pidilite-stauf-r-105.name: STAUF R 105
pidilite-stauf-r-105.description: Two-component polyurethane adhesive for floor coverings. Waterproof and highly-resistant for demanding rubber and synthetic sports flooring installations.

pidilite-stauf-puk-447.name: STAUF PUK 447
pidilite-stauf-puk-447.description: Hard two-component elastic polyurethane wood flooring adhesive, shear strength >680 psi. For wide plank and solid parquet. Complies with ISO 17178 (hard elastic classification).
pidilite-stauf-puk-447.classification: 2K PU wood flooring adhesive — ISO 17178 (hard elastic)

pidilite-stauf-multilayer.name: STAUF MULTILAYER
pidilite-stauf-multilayer.description: One-component elastic hybrid (MS polymer) wood flooring adhesive per ISO 17178 for elastically-deformable engineered multi-layer wood flooring. Water and solvent-free — no wood swelling. Underfloor-heating compatible.
pidilite-stauf-multilayer.classification: 1K MS-polymer hybrid wood flooring adhesive — ISO 17178
application_areas: Concrete, calcium sulphate, chipboard, OSB subfloors

pidilite-stauf-floorfix-d53.name: STAUF FLOORFIX D 53
pidilite-stauf-floorfix-d53.description: Self-levelling floor leveling compound for fine-finish cementitious subfloor preparation before wood/resilient flooring.

pidilite-stauf-floorfix-d63.name: STAUF FLOORFIX D 63
pidilite-stauf-floorfix-d63.description: High-performance self-levelling floor leveling compound for heavier traffic applications and greater thickness range than D 53.

pidilite-stauf-floorfix-vep93.name: STAUF FLOORFIX VEP 93
pidilite-stauf-floorfix-vep93.description: Two-component solvent-free epoxy primer and bonding agent for flooring substrates. Moisture vapor barrier on damp concrete (above 4% RH).

pidilite-dr-fixit-epoxy-putty.name: DR. FIXIT EPOXY PUTTY (PIDIPOXY)
pidilite-dr-fixit-epoxy-putty.description: Two-component epoxy putty/repair compound. High bonding, compressive and flexural strength for horizontal, vertical and overhead jobs. Bonds fresh-to-hardened concrete, anchors engine bolts and marble to plywood. Immersible permanently in water.
application_areas: Anchoring dowel bars, base plates, engine bolts
pidilite-dr-fixit-epoxy-putty.chemical_resistance: Vegetable/mineral oils, alkalis, continuous water immersion

pidilite-paviland-sl-10.name: PAVILAND SL 10 / SOLERA AUTONIVELANTE
pidilite-paviland-sl-10.description: CT C25 F5 cementitious self-levelling screed of great fluidity and normal setting. For interior self-levelling screeds 10-50 mm (bonded) or 50-100 mm (floating). Radiant heating compatible.

pidilite-dr-fixit-fastflex.name: DR. FIXIT FASTFLEX
pidilite-dr-fixit-fastflex.description: High-performance polymer-modified flexible cementitious waterproofing membrane. Two-component system for wet areas and water-retaining structures (swimming pools, water features). Potable-water-tank rated.
pack_size: 12 kg kit (7 kg powder + 5 kg polymer)

pidilite-dr-fixit-unicem-31.name: DR. FIXIT UNICEM 3.1
pidilite-dr-fixit-unicem-31.description: Two-component acrylic copolymer-based flexible cementitious waterproofing system. Crack-bridging, carbonation/chloride protection, potable-water-tank rated. For roofs, balconies, wet areas, concrete tanks.
pidilite-dr-fixit-unicem-31.classification: Flexible cementitious waterproofing (EN 14891 CM O1 P)
pack_size: 20 kg kit (15 kg powder + 5 kg liquid)
application_areas: Back-coating of natural stone and mineral cladding
